[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001000 1
1 01000110 3
2 00110010 3
3 11001000 3
4 10101000 3
5 11111111 a
6 10001101 4
7 00111011 5

01 00110111 5
12 11011111 7

70 11001111 6
